name: Centella Asiatica
description: A healing botanical known as 'tiger grass' that repairs the skin barrier and calms inflammation.
scientificSummary: Contains asiaticoside, madecassoside, and asiatic acid which stimulate collagen synthesis and reduce inflammation.
mechanismOfAction: Activates fibroblasts to produce collagen and inhibits inflammatory cytokines for calming effects.

seo.title: Centella Asiatica - Skin Repair Extract | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Centella Asiatica calms irritation, repairs the skin barrier, and supports wound healing.
